description: Ketubba fragment. The groom's name is Mazal Ṭov ha-Levi, and the bride is Esther. The eight lines below in smaller handwriting contain a detailed account of the conditions of the betrothal, and the date is given as Monday, 14 Sivan 5401 AM = 23 May 1641 CE. The name of the place is obliterated. Information from FGP.
description_he: קטע כתובה. חתן: מזל טוב הלוי. כלה: אסתר. תאריך: יום שני, י"ד בסיוון ה'תא"א = 23 במאי 1641.
